name: A WZG balance overhaul
author: Waldo
description: Easy, casual Icarus game mode. Less grind, more fun.

name: Aberiu's Supply Crates
author: Aberiu
description: Add supply crates for Prometheus resouces (requires red exotics to purchase)

name: Absolute Chaos - Core
author: AgentKush
description: Base layer of the Absolute Chaos modpack. Overrides player Base_Stats with 76 chaos buffs (5000kg carry, 600 move speed, fall-damage immunity, zero survival drain, +900% XP and crafting) and zeros research/replication cost on all 335 workshop items. v0.2.1 drops the empty workshop tab and ships a banner.

name: Agent's BioLab
author: AgentKush
description: All 11 legendary Bio Lab weapons in the Workshop - includes Sandwyrm Chainsaw

name: Agents Individual Item Kits
author: AgentKush
description: v5.2: Fixed workshop grid clipping into top sell bar. Re-sorted all 2,683 kits into 20 category groups with box-width spacing between each group. Categories: Raw Resources, Refined Materials, Seeds, Food, Drinks & Medicine, Melee Weapons, Bows & Crossbows, Firearms, Ammunition, Explosives, Shields, Armor, Attachments, Tools, Gear, Building Pieces, Crafting Stations, Deployables, Lighting, Trophies & Decor.

name: All Ammo Turret
author: Jimk72
description: Just for fun. Has custom turret model, fires full auto, shoots every type of ammo, arrows, and bolts. Goes through lots of ammo!

name: All In One
author: Hazer
description: Combines several of my mods into one, including energy production, fillable and DropShip slots, and more

name: All In One + 250
author: Hazer
description: Combines several of my mods into one, including energy production, fillable and DropShip slots, + Stacks 250 (removed the Oil Barrels because they loose the Oil when they stack with an empty Barrel)

files.exmodz: https://github.com/Hazer-Bazer/Icarus-Mods/raw/refs/heads/main/All In One + Stack 250/Hazers ALL IN ONE + STACK 250.EXMODZ

name: Always Show Buildings On Map
author: AgentKush
description: Always shows player-built structures on the map and minimap without requiring radar or special stats.

name: Ammo Crafting Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: 50 new ammo recipes. 50x batch crafting for all arrow and bullet types including special ammo. Plus 8 ammo conversion recipes.

name: Apex's Beetopia
author: Apex
description: A huge overhaul for bees and bee-related things.

name: Apex's Compact Crafting
author: Apex
description: Adds place-able stacks of ingots for each ingot type, each stack contains 100 ingots.

name: Apex's CureAll Tonic
author: Apex
description: A craftable cure-all tonic, with a pill variant. Currently, however, it only cures the 4 major afflictions that the tonics cure: Bacterial, Infections, Parasitic, and Concussions.

name: Apex's Glutton
author: Apex
description: Craftable tonic and tea.

name: Apex's Miasmic Protection
author: Apex
description: An assortment of items used to protect the prospector from miasmic damage.

name: Apex's More Seeds
author: Apex
description: Processing Recipes for all seeds.

name: Armor Attachment Expansion
author: AgentKush
description: 25 new craftable armor attachments (5 per body part). Uses base-game stat keys so effects stack with talents and other attachments. Craft at Alteration Bench.

name: Armor Set Bonuses Enhanced
author: AgentKush
description: Enhanced armor set bonuses with 3-piece partial bonuses for mix-and-match builds. 33 sets get a 3-piece threshold (~40% bonus) plus boosted 5-piece bonuses (+75% positive, +50% resistances).

name: Aurokon Industries
author: Aurokon
description: This is a straightforward mod that introduces a new workshop tab featuring 5 prefab kits. These kits exclusively contain building pieces and do not include any benches. Each kit is available for research and can be purchased with Ren.

name: Battery Powered Storage
author: Jimk72
description: A workshop battery powered crate to keep your food fresh! Found under Jimk Innovations tab in workshop.

name: Bear Mount
author: Jimk72
description: Allows the raising of cubs into full grown bear mounts. Bear now eats and drinks from deployables. Fully updated to use the new talents system for mounts. Created Custom Talent tree with Bear background image and center Icon. Still can only use the standard saddle and the cargo saddle. Ver. 3.3 Allows Breeding of bears.

name: Bestiary
author: Venomtron
description: Increases the amount of Bestiary points (not compatible with Venomtron mod)

name: Bestiary Fix
author: AgentKush
description: Adds missing Kill/Skin experience events for Sulfur Worm, Sulfur Vesper, Cave Worm, and Vesper to help Bestiary tracking.

name: Bestiary Mega
author: Venomtron
description: Increases the amount of Bestiary points. 1000 points per kill/skin (not compatible with Venomtron mod)

name: Better Glass
author: Jimk72
description: Replaces Glass from original glass building pieces. Fixed issues with destructables loosing textures. Already included with Glass Buildables.

name: Better Lights
author: Jimk72
description: Makes the flashlight, Torch, and Lantern bright to fill the darkness. 1.3 Added More Lights!

name: Better Mission Rewards
author: AgentKush
description: Doubles mission payouts - 2x credits, 2x account XP, 2x faction reputation across all faction missions. Talent unlocks untouched.

name: Better Pistol Turret
author: Jimk72
description: Increases fire rate, increases targeting rate and turret movement, increases inventory slots, increased durability, and reduced power requirements to 1000.

name: Better Supplies
author: darkhyn
description: Adds jerky, jelly, and a performance increasing drug to the workshop to take on your missions

name: BF_Shengong_Invincible
author: BruteForceOAP
description: Gives both Shendong Envirosuits major buffs to make you almost invincible

name: BigBoxStack
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: With this mod, you can now stack your MXC Crate, Preservation Crate, or your Deep Freeze up to 3 high.

name: BiggerCraftQueue
author: RevenantKitsune
description: Increases the max number of items that can be queued in most benches

name: Building Height Strength
author: Jimk72
description: Changes all building materials to be stronger than concrete for super tall structures. Ver 2.6 Added Sandworm buildings.

name: Camera Distance
author: Jimk72
description: Allows the photo camera to move far away from player to get better shots. Ver. 1.1 Increased Speed and Distance and removed Collision from camera!

name: CARBON Paste
author: Cryorus
description: Putting the CARBON back into Carbon Paste

name: Chance-LitSigns
author: Chance_4090
description: Make all sign text glow in the dark and adds many more colors to choose from!

name: Chance-LongerCables
author: Chance_4090
description: Multiply the length of the cable/pipe tools (Water, Power, Crude Oil, Refined oil, Biofuel and Beacon Sticks) to be 10 times longer.

name: Charging Backpacks
author: Hazer
description: Charging Backpacks

name: Clear Photo Lens
author: Jimk72
description: Removes Lens, frame, and text at bottom of screan for a clear view in photo mode.

name: CompoundBow Kryptic Camo
author: Jimk72
description: This is a replacement skin for the compound bow that matches my armor skin.

name: Concrete with Wood Interior
author: Jimk72
description: Gives more options when deploying concrete wall. Adds Interior wood option to the inside of concrete wall, door frame, window frame, double door frames. Adds option for short Interior wood beam, and Adds Iron reinforced interior wood floor. Crafted at the Machining Bench. Similar look as the reinforced door and with the strength of Stone floor. Ver 2.5 Added wall angles L,R,L Invert, R Invert, and Peak.

name: Coracks_Adlift_Hide_Map_info
author: Corack
description: This modifys the Adlift Module to hide the map from insertion to reboot. Upon removal it will show player position, waypoints and dropships. Useful for making things harder or for a personal family PVP session.

name: Coracks_Adlift_Increased_Ores
author: Corack
description: Workshop Adlift Module now works like a pickaxe attachment and gives increased ores

name: Coracks_Ammo_and_Repair_x100
author: Corack
description: This makes all workshop ammo and the repair kit give you 100 each time you purchase. Added new workshop rifle ammo.

name: Coracks_Ammo_and_Repair_x500
author: Corack
description: This makes all workshop ammo and the repair kit give you 500 each time you purchase. Added new workshop rifle ammo.

name: Coracks_Base_Item_Variations
author: Corack
description: Adds the Original Benches in the game as an option! Cooking Bench, Concrete Furnace, Electric Furnace,  Electric Dehumidifier, Glassworking Bench Also adds small upper cabinets

name: Coracks_Crossbows_N_Bows
author: Corack
description: This adds the highlight projectile function to  all Crossbows and Bows. It also makes Crossbows slightly more powerful and makes progressions more linear

name: Coracks_Expanded_Pouches
author: Corack
description: All Pouchs hold 70 of any item. Added new colored pouches

name: Coracks_NonVisuals
author: Corack
description: My verion of 250 Slots, some Stacks, Power Improvements and medium Heat/AC Range improvements.

name: Coracks_Occasional_Weather
author: Corack
description: This changes all weather patterns to 4 days of mild then one day of 3 segmented generated pattern. Storms generally last 5 min approximately

name: Coracks_Patcher1_Resources
author: Corack
description: This changes the Patcher 1 Module to 1 hit trees,Ores,Rocks and Bones. Plus Pneunonia resistance. Carry Capacity and Fishing Benefits.

name: Coracks_Patcher2_Hunting
author: Corack
description: This changes the Patcher 2 Module to have the abilities of other available modules. Wound,Fire,Hyperthermia,Hypothermia Resistances. Highlight Animals, Movement Speed. Moount Speed. See Creatures on the map.)

name: Coracks_Saddle_Improvements
author: Corack
description: This gives the Saddles unique specs for the animal it's equipped onto. used Sarge_Basic_Saddle_Improvements as guide. Added Basic and Laika.

name: Coracks_Tools
author: Corack
description: My version of tools modification to live a linear progression to all tools in the game at time of this writting

name: Coracks_Weekend_Flash_Weather
author: Corack
description: Disabled Debris, Lightning, Treetopple,Cloud and Wind effect Visuals. No Forest fires now. 5 light weather days followed by 2 days of mixed weather Storms are roughly 5 min. Less Tier 5 and 6 Storms

name: Coracks_Weekend_Normal_Weather
author: Corack
description: 5 light weather days followed by 2 day of regular weather Storms. Less Tier 5 and 6 Storms.

name: CowNChickenOverhaul
author: RevenantKitsune
description: Speeds up the production speed of milk and eggs from cows and chickens

name: Craftables
author: Jimk72
description: Allows crafting of large statues for display in your home or patio. Includes: Windmill(5000watts), wood cupboard, interior cupboard(Resized and snaps together), metal cupboard, Statues(Large Komodo,Large Buffalo, large caveworm, Superlarge caveworm, Deer stone, Deer wood, Elephant stone). Ver 2.5 Added snapping to all 3 cabinets.

name: Creature Difficulty Scaling
author: AgentKush
description: Dynamic creature level scaling for level 500 cap. 161 spawn zones, 180 creatures, 5 scaling rules, full affliction system (poison, concussion, sprains, bee swarms, komodo bites), epic creatures with exotic loot, biome temperature modifiers, and autonomous spawns. v2.3: DarkAngel collab - adds 8 new data tables (73 entries) for afflictions, epic creatures, exotic loot, biome temps, prospect stats, and spawn zones.

name: Creature Drop Enhancer
author: AgentKush
description: Doubles all creature butchery and skinning outputs across 62 recipes. 2x leather, bone, fur, meat, and rare drops.

name: Cry's Lvl 120 Cap - 100%
author: Cryorus
description: Raises the visible Level Cap to 120 and gives enough skill points to 100% the skill trees

name: Cry's Lvl 120 Cap - 25%
author: Cryorus
description: Raises the visible Level Cap to 120 and gives enough skill points to fill 25% of the skills

name: Cry's Lvl 120 Cap - 50%
author: Cryorus
description: Raises the visible Level Cap to 120 and gives enough skill points to fill 50% of the skills

name: Cry's Lvl 120 Cap - 75%
author: Cryorus
description: Raises the visible Level Cap to 120 and gives enough skill points to fill 75% of the skills

name: Culinex Food Boost Fix
author: AgentKush
description: v2.9: Fixed remaining D_ItemsStatic reference in Raw_Chicken_Butchery input (crash fix for butcher bench). All recipe references now use D_ItemTemplate. | Fixes Culinex (Chef's Backpack) 25% food effectiveness boost to apply to all cooked foods.

name: Custom Options Handheld
author: Jimk72
description: Handheld that Gives you a new menu when you open it. Includes custom jump heights, double jump, tripple jump, and adjusts out of bounds timer as well as clear vegitation and clear all storms. Can clear cave worms, server compatible now. Turn Lights On/Off, Fire sources, and Find corpses added.

name: Custom Options Laptop
author: Jimk72
description: Deployable Laptop available in the workshop under Jimk Innovations tab, that Gives you a Options menu when you open it. Includes custom jump heights, double jump, tripple jump, and adjusts out of bounds timer as well as clear vegitation and clear all storms. Can clear cave worms, server compatible now. Turn Lights On/Off, Fire sources, and Find corpses added.

name: Custom Options Menu
author: Jimk72
description: Gives you a new menu when you right click with fists equiped. Includes custom jump heights, double jump, tripple jump, and adjusts out of bounds timer as well as clear vegitation and clear all storms. Can clear cave worms, server compatible now. Turn Lights On/Off, Fire sources, and Find corpses added. Now Pauses upon opening.

name: Custom Puck Lights
author: Jimk72
description: Now Found in the Workshop under Jimk Innovations. Looks like a crate with Lights around it. Item that when consumed gives you a crate and 6 new types of deployable LED lights(No Power Needed). Including an Anti-Gravity light and Deployable Light switches to control them all with and various wall, floor, and ceiling lights.

name: Dark-Bags
author: DarkAngel
description: Adds three specialized bags to Icarus: a Big Bag for heavy cargo, a Food Bag to keep your provisions fresh, and an Ammo Bag for all your ammunition needs.

name: Dark-ElectricFabricator
author: DarkAngel
description: Make the Fabricator need energy to work, as it should be from beginning, now the fabricator needs 2500 energy to work. And in adition have moved the Portable Biofuel Generator and Spline Tool Electricity to Tier 3, and added the Jimk72 Windmill Generator 1.4.

name: Dark-MoreAttachments
author: DarkAngel
description: Added 3 new armor attachments: AEGIS Envirosuit Expansion , AEGIS Envirosuit Expansion Mk II , Cargo Expansion, Exotic Radiation Dampener

name: Dark-MoreHardStorms
author: DarkAngel
description: An immersive weather overhaul that reshapes Icarus' climate. Storms are more frequent, last longer, and strike harder, creating a hostile and unpredictable world where timing, shelter, and preparation matter more than ever.

name: Dark-NewMetaExtractionTweaks
author: DarkAngel
description: This mod rebalances and enhances the Meta-tier extraction equipment by improving power management, battery capacity, and crafting costs, making late-game devices more efficient and practical to use. Reduced battery capacity to 25000, crafting costs are rebalanced, the radar now needs meta power source, but the battery is now chargeable in the charging device that can now have 2 slots to charge and the extractor have 2 slots too to add batteries.

name: Dark-Shops
author: DarkAngel
description: Rebalanced shop prices and trade quantities across all exchanges — because your work as a prospector deserves fair value.

name: Dark-UndersuitsPlus
author: DarkAngel
description: Dark-UndersuitsPlus enhances existing undersuits with improved stats and better balance, making them more useful throughout progression without breaking immersion, compatibility and original identity.

name: Dark-Workshop
author: DarkAngel
description: Workshop tab with Armour, modules and some other goodies ..

name: DarkDantes Wicked PickAxe and Hammer
author: DarkDante
description: Mod contains new PickAxe [Shatterspike] and Repair Tool [Oathbound Hammer]

name: Dev Tools
author: Hazer
description: Mod Tools, Thors Hammer, ReSize, Destroy etc.

name: Dev Tools Kit
author: AgentKush
description: v1.1.3: Substituted visible meshes for 3 tools that previously used the invisible placeholder (Inspection Tool → Scanner mesh, Bug Tool → Beacon mesh, Transform Tool → Building Hammer mesh); added Debug_Target dev dummy (new 11th tool); fixed Thor's Hammer Focusable ref (Focusable_2H → Focusable_Sledge). Rearranged Workshop tree to a 4-row × 3-column grid so it fits within the vertical workshop bounds. — Unlocks 10 hidden developer tools including Thor's Hammer (fly mode), Transform Tool, Destroy Tool, Inspection Tool, Fireball, Pyromancy Flame, and more. v1.1.2: Fixed broken mesh and actionable references for current game data.

name: Dexterhaven Labs
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Introduces a custom tab to the Orbital Workshop, containing many useful items.

name: Dexterlabs Panther Suit Module
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: This powerful suit module replaces the Patcher I and combines characteristics of multiple modules.

name: Dexterlabs Panther Suit Module Mark2
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: A more powerful and mutually exlusive version of the Panther suit module, this incorporates the What is This talent (for a chance of exotics when mining metals) and reivies the Gifts of Tartarus from CritFail, removing cave sickness.

name: Dexterlabs Panther Suit Module Mark3
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: A more powerful and mutually exlusive version of the Panther suit module, this incorporates the What is This talent (for a chance of exotics when mining metals) and reivies the Gifts of Tartarus from CritFail, removing cave sickness. The Mark 3 version adds some buffs, including radiation resistance, and costs more, including Uranium currency.

name: Dextermod: Bifrost_Titanium_Crossbow
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Requires more resources to craft, hits harder and has a much higher ammo capacity. This mod replaces the vanilla Titanium Crossbow, crafted in the Fabricator, with this more expensive and powerful version.

name: Dextermod: Enhanced Tactical Backpack
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: A greatly enhanced version of the Larkwell-Martinez Tactical Backpack.

name: Dextermod: One_Hit_Wonder_10
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Enhances Peerless Lumberjack and Lucky Strike talents for a 10% higher chance of chopping trees or mining voxels in just one hit.

name: Dextermod: One_Hit_Wonder_25
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Enhances Peerless Lumberjack and Lucky Strike talents for a 25% higher chance of chopping trees or mining voxels in just one hit.

name: Dextermod: One_Hit_Wonder_50
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Enhances Peerless Lumberjack and Lucky Strike talents for a 50% higher chance of chopping trees or mining voxels in just one hit.

name: Dextermod: One_Hit_Wonder_65
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Enhances Peerless Lumberjack and Lucky Strike talents for a 65% higher chance of chopping trees or mining voxels in just one hit.

name: Dextermod: Stackable Crop Plots
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: All four tiers of crop plots are now stackable, up to a stack of 20.

name: Dextermod: Stronger HVAC
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: This mod greatly increases the range of the Heavy Heater, the Heavy Air Conditioner, and the Dehumidifiers.

name: Dextermod: WaldoPak
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Brings back the enhanced Exotic repair pack from WZG.

name: Dextermod: WaterWorks Turbo
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Enables adding some key ingredients to the WaterWheel Generator and the Water Pump to craft upgraded Turbo versions on the Fabricator. These new versions give the prospector much higher power transfer from the WaterWheel, and much greater water throughput from the pump.

name: Donovan's Larger Resource Stacks (Wood & Stone)
author: Donovan
description: Increases the stack size of wood and stone, including the craftable resource stacks

name: Donovan's Mega Points
author: Donovan
description: 6 talent points and 10 blueprint points per level

name: Donovan's More Points
author: Donovan
description: Increases the amount of talent and blueprint points you get per level

name: DropShip
author: Hazer
description: DropShip Slots increased from 15 - 30.

name: Durability
author: Jimk72
description: Bumps the durability to 120000 for almost all items.

name: Dyls123's Horse Cart
author: Dyls123
description: Adds a cart for horses

name: Dyls123's Stamina Module
author: Dyls123
description: Adds a Stamina Module to the Workshop that increases stamina in many different ways.

name: Easy Cave
author: Jimk72
description: Prevents worms from spawning and automaticly give your the Dehumidifier buff in all caves. Ver 1.2 added all new missions from the Great Hunts.

name: Elevators
author: Jimk72
description: A craftable platform that will raise character 1,2,3,4,8,or 16 floors. When Deploying hold R for different variations. Must be deployed on a floor structure. Updated to use my custom floor piece from my upcoming Steel Buildables mod.

name: Exotic Economy Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: Full currency exchange system with 66 recipes. Buy and sell materials with Ren, convert between exotics and currencies, cross-convert ingots, and bulk smelt ores at the correct furnaces/benches.

name: Experience
author: Venomtron
description: Intended for leveling up a new character. Just drop down to planet, and start cutting down trees.Chop Tree = 1 mill XPFell Tree = 1 mill XP

name: Extended Deep Ore Scanner Range
author: AgentKush
description: 10x detection range for the Deep Ore Scanner - find deep exotic and epic ore deposits from 3km instead of 300m. Applies to the Deep Ore Scanner and Advanced Deep Ore Scanner. PAK mod - modifies a Blueprint asset. All players and server must have it installed for multiplayer.

name: Extended Scanner Range
author: AgentKush
description: 10x detection range for the Cave Scanner and Fish Finder (Cave 3km, base/Fish 1.5km). PAK mod - modifies Blueprint assets. All players and server must install for multiplayer.

name: Extended Spoil Timers
author: AgentKush
description: Extends decay timers on 33 items. Food 5x longer, other decay 3x longer. Not compatible with Hardcore Rebalance Pack.

name: Extended Wire and Pipe Tool
author: AgentKush
description: 10x range extension for all power cables and pipes. Power cables 60m, water pipes 60m, biofuel pipes 60m, crude oil pipes 100m. PAK mod - modifies Blueprint asset. All players and server must have it installed for multiplayer.

name: Extraction 10 Seconds
author: Jimk72
description: Changes the extraction speed to 10 seconds per ore. Updated to include all the new ores.

name: Extraction 10 Seconds
author: TheOrangeFloof
description: Decreases Exotics Extractor Time To 10 Seconds

name: Extraction 5 Seconds
author: Jimk72
description: Changes the extraction speed to 5 seconds per ore. Updated to include all the new ores.

name: Extraction 5 Seconds
author: TheOrangeFloof
description: Decreases Exotics Extractor Time To 10 Seconds

name: Extractor-Radar
author: Venomtron
description: Extractors & Radars can be placed in inventory

name: Eye Colors Expanded!
author: Bostonstrong567
description: introduces a wider range of eye colors for your character customization in Icarus.

name: Fast Processing (10x)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing 10x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Fast Processing (15x)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing 15x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Fast Processing (25x)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing 25x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Fast Processing (5x)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing 5x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Fast Processing (Instant)
author: AgentKush
description: All crafting and processing instant. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Faster Crafting
author: AgentKush
description: Halves crafting time on 2175 recipes across all workbenches. Minimum 500 MJ for water recipes. v1.4: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Faster Harvest Tools
author: AgentKush
description: 2x harvest yield from every gathering tool - mining, felling, reaping and skinning - across all 74 tool tiers. Data mod.

name: Faster Taming Speed
author: Hazer
description:
Faster Taming and Gestation Speed.

New animals included. Young animals spawn more frequently and in groups near their parents.

name: Faster Titanium
author: Jimk72
description: Increases Titanium in the world and speeds up processing for Titanium, Steel, and Aluminum.

name: Ferani Barren Lands
author: Ferani
description: All cosmetic foliage is disabled in the game.

name: Ferani Bluebacks
author: Ferani
description: Bluebacks and Redbacks are now ridable and tamable! Find them in the wild and tame a new mount, or order one from the Workshop.

name: Ferani Building Stability
author: Ferani
description: Building stability increased, huge building range for any building material, both horizontal and vertically.

name: Ferani Buyable Zebras
author: Ferani
description: The zebra mounts from the Icarus: Zebra Rescue Mission DLC are now available for purchase at the workshop! Buy as many striped best friends as you wish.

name: Ferani Compatible Ammo
author: Ferani
description: Any ammunition is compatible with any firearm - except for flares. Arrows and bolts can be used by both bows and crossbows. Any ammunition can be used for turrets.

name: Ferani Effortless Lights
author: Ferani
description: Lights and candles don't need power or fuel.

name: Ferani Fall-proof Paws
author: Ferani
description: Tames have no fall damage. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

name: Ferani Foraging Paws
author: Ferani
description: All animals have the grazing ability, so they can find their own food. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

name: Ferani Gentle Paws
author: Ferani
description: Tamed pets and mounts cause no damage to your buildings and deployables. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

name: Ferani Heated Animal Bed
author: Ferani
description: The Animal Heated Bed now actually is warm. It now requires two electronics to craft, but it now gives off +10 degrees celsius of warmth, 25% stamina regeneration, and 25% health regeneration.

name: Ferani Homestead Expanded
author: Ferani
description: Extended Homestead: Added functionality to many Homestead DLC items!

name: Ferani Hungry Paws
author: Ferani
description: Your tames and mounts can eat human food and gain buffs, and have 2 extra stomach spaces. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

name: Ferani Lava-Proof Paws
author: Ferani
description: Tamed animals and mounts are fully immune to lava and will not catch fire if they touch it. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

name: Ferani Lava-Proofing
author: Ferani
description: You can build in lava without your materials burning up. Great for building bridges in volcanic areas.

name: Ferani Mount Compass
author: Ferani
description: Mount icons on the compass have no max distance.

name: Ferani Obedient Paws
author: Ferani
description: All tamed pets and mounts can follow orders. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

name: Ferani Padded Paws
author: Ferani
description: Mounts and tames do not take damage from defensive structures, like spikes and hedgehogs.

name: Ferani Sneaky Paws
author: Ferani
description: Mounts and tames have significantly less threat, so they won't be spotted as easily. Juveniles do not get attacked at all. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

name: Ferani Speedy Paws
author: Ferani
description: Pets and tames are able to keep up with you while travelling, and juveniles can teleport to you when stuck. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

name: Ferani's Obedience Training Base Mod
author: Ferani
description: Base mod for the Obedience Training-collection. This mod does nothing on its own, but it is the root of all Obedience Training-mods.

name: Fillable
author: Venomtron
description: Doubles amount held in Canteen, Oxygen tank, Jerry can & lantern (not compatible with Venomtron mod)

name: Fillable
author: Hazer
description: Fillable increased

name: Fish and Farming Boost
author: AgentKush
description: 390 changes: crops grow 2x faster across 211 growth states, harvests +50%, +2 cultivations, 57 fish spawn zones doubled, fish quality +50%.

name: Flick Those Devices
author: Cryorus
description: Adds the abilit to turn some devices like the chimney or furnaces on and off with a button press just like wall torches

name: Floof LevelCap
author: TheOrangeFloof
description: Increases Displayed Level And Max Level, Does Not Grant Extra Points After Level 50

name: Floofs Leveling Mod
author: TheOrangeFloof
description: Increases Displayed Level And Max Level, Should Grant Extra Points After Level 50

name: Floofs QOL
author: TheOrangeFloof
description: Floofs Modpack, Introduces A Bunch Of Changes And Overhauls To Items

name: Genetic Mastery
author: AgentKush
description: Elite trait lineages (Brave, Hardy, Bold, Fierce, Savage and more) are 4x more common - wild and bred creatures far more often carry powerful genetics. Stacks with Genetics & Breeding Overhaul.

name: Genetics & Breeding Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: Supercharges the Mendel genetics system: 2x mutation/twins/gestation/recovery/lineage rewards from the Genetics talents, plus a bloodline rarity rebalance (rarer Wild, more achievable Alpha) for far less grindy selective breeding.

name: Glass Buildables
author: Jimk72
description: Updated original glass pieces to use new glass and steel textures and added full new tier of glass building pieces. All craftable on the glass bench. Ver 1.5 Changed to Composite Glass to remove confusion and added new building pieces and beams.

name: Globeadue 20 Slot Dropship
author: globeadue
description: Sets the dropship to 20 inventory slots

name: Globeadue Husk Epoxy
author: globeadue
description: Adds recipe to make epoxy using 20 sap and 1 caveworm husk

name: Globeadue Iron Shotgun Shells
author: globeadue
description: Adds recipee to make shotgun shells with iron instead of copper

name: Globeadue MXC Toolbox
author: globeadue
description: Replaces the MXC Crate option in workshop with a MXC Toolbox consumable. Consuming produces a collection of the base MXC tools(axe, pick etc), a MXC Cot, Led Flashlight, a MXC crate and a MXC campfire. A bit of comet coal included for the campfire.

name: Globeadue Reploter
author: globeadue
description: Adds a recipe that takes a normal farm plot and outputs a normal farm plot. This allows you to apply your farm plot talents without having to destroy the farm plot and recraft it, loosing half the materials.

name: Globeadue Seed Starter
author: globeadue
description: This mod reimages most of the seed packet tree in the workshop. See readme for full details.

name: Globeadue Shields
author: globeadue
description: Adds an Aluminium Shield that is tougher than the wood shield and returns a little bit dmg back to the attacker.

name: Globeadue Wood 2 Sap
author: globeadue
description: Adds a recipe to the Woodcrafting bench to make sap out of wood logs. 1:3 Ratio

name: Halloween Pumpkins
author: Jimk72
description: Allows crafting of several variations of Halloween Pumpkins to deploy around your home.

name: Hardcore Rebalance Pack
author: AgentKush
description: For survivors who think Icarus is too easy. v2.0: Tiered creature scaling - Forest +75% HP/+40% Melee (23), Mid-Tier +125%/+60% (37), Hard Biome +200%/+90% (42), Boss/Alpha +300%/+120% (12). Epic creatures tiered (250-500% HP). Horde waves ramp Level 30-75. Weather damage -20%, food buffs +25%. 1438 changes across 17 data tables + 2 blueprint overrides.

name: Harvester 1 sec
author: Venomtron
description: Speeds up the Harvesting of red exotics and the cleansing of them. (not compatible with Venomtron mod)

name: Harvester 5 sec
author: Venomtron
description: Speeds up the Harvesting of red exotics and the cleansing of them. (not compatible with Venomtron mod)

name: Hidden Building Pieces
author: AgentKush
description: 34 building pieces - frames (full/half/pillar) and diagonal sets for 11+ materials. Corner stairs, stairs and curved pieces removed - now official in the base game.

name: Higher Energy
author: Hazer
description: Higher Energy Production (now with Pump Jack Oil increase)

name: HK 417
author: Jimk72
description: HK_417 is a selectable semi and full auto rifle.

name: HK 417 Camo
author: Jimk72
description: HK_417 is a selectable semi and full auto rifle.

name: HK 417 Reflex
author: Jimk72
description: HK_417 Reflex is a selectable semi and full auto rifle with Reflex sight, Silencer, and Flashlight attached.

name: HK 417 Sienna
author: Jimk72
description: HK_417 is a selectable semi and full auto rifle.

name: Hunter's Critical Strike
author: AgentKush
description: The first-ever critical-hit mod. Weak-point hits deal far more critical damage - standard/metal weak points 2x, mini ~2.6x, elite +50%. Rewards precision aiming.

name: Improved T3&4 Tools
author: Cryorus
description: Making various changes to T3 & 4 Tools to make them viable up/sidegrades

name: Increase Stacks
author: Jimk72
description: 4.0 Added a few new Items by request and the new DLC Items. 3.6 Added new Items from the Great Hunt. Increases all lower stacks to 100. Ver. 3.4 Added all new Items and increased refined wood, concrete mix, and Electronics to 1000.

name: Increased Slots
author: Jimk72
description: There are several versions people have made this is mine that I use. It bumps up a few storage and firepits storage slots.

name: Indestructible Tools & Weapons
author: AgentKush
description: Maximum durability on all tools, weapons, armor, buildings, doors, and crafting stations. 199 items modified to never break. v1.8: Version bump for latest game update.

name: Intreeg's 4XP
author: Intreeg
description: Quadruples experience earned.

name: Intreeg's More Resources
author: Intreeg
description: This mod increases the resources rendered from refinement reducing the need to spelunk more than a few times. Requires all DLC. See details in the README

name: Jimk Added Deployables
author: Jimk72
description: Ver 1.8 Updated for week 151, Removed Damage Modifiers. Contains Xtra Large Aquarium, Water Extractor, Vapor Collector, and Large Wind Turbine. All crafted on the Fabricator bench.

name: Jimk Barn Buildables
author: Jimk72
description: Everything you need to build the Barn of your dreams! All Items are crafted on the Carpentry Bench. All new wood grain texture, roof pieces with soffet hangovers, red painted exterior, sliding barn doors, hay bales for animals to eat from, custom doors and shutters, matching fences and gate pieces, matching interior deployables, stable walls with metal bars. Ver. 1.2, Added several more roof/wall pieces, several beam options. Re did Lights. Should help with FPS

name: Jimk Clear Biomes
author: Jimk72
description: Added New Elysium Biomes

name: Jimk Eden Buildable Base
author: Jimk72
description: Removes Building restrictions inside Eden and Clears out two rooms for you to build in and opens the door for access to a large opening behind MO that you can build a very nice base, all inside Eden.

name: Jimk Fences
author: Jimk72
description: A mod that adds several fences to the game and defensive razor wire. Has two types of wood fences each with a tall version for larger animals and chain link fencing for a more industrial look. Also includes matching gates for wood and chain link fences. Special thanks to Maxus! without his generous donation these would not be possible!

name: Jimk Fixed Deployables
author: Jimk72
description: Allows doors to be placed when ground or items in the way. Allows many Deployables to be placed on top of others. V 1.1 Removed placement checks so now any deployable(Not Buildings) can be placed anywhere! Be aware of deployables taking damage from placing partialy outside base!

name: Jimk Foundry Remake
author: Jimk72
description: Replaces the Foundry with a slightly smaller model with all the extra models removed so it fits in your base like all the rest of the benches. Also Reduced its weight to adjust for less equipment. Ver 1.1 Fixed for game changes.

name: Jimk Free Crafting Module
author: Jimk72
description: A handy Workshop module(Under Jimk Innovations) that allows you to craft everything in Icarus for free. Adds New slot when Equipped!

name: Jimk Free Lights
author: Jimk72
description: Ver 1.3 Added more Lights. Adds A free Lantern, Deployable Light(3 types) and light switch(1 for each light) to your characters crafting menu. Lights uses Exotic lithium system for power so they never run out.

name: Jimk Free Water and Electric
author: Jimk72
description: Adds deployable Outlets, Water tap, and water pump that are free to craft and give 10000 output. No more wires/hoses all over.

name: Jimk Garden Deployables
author: Jimk72
description: Adds several Garden Deployables.

name: Jimk Garden Planters
author: Jimk72
description: Adds several craftable planters to the game. Adds Craftable Exotic Planting Soil. This soil has 6 different versions that effect the plants differently. 1-Reduces plant size by 50% 2-Reduces plant size by 25% 3-Keeps standard plant size 4-Increases plant size by 150% 5-Increases plant size by 200% 6-Increases plant size by 400% The mutation prevents crops from being harvested so this is only for visual aesthetics! Fixed texture issues on concrete planters.

name: Jimk Higher Base Payouts For Missions
author: Jimk72
description: Bump All mission rewards up to 650 base for Ren and 600 base for Exotics if mission has exotic rewards! Licence up to 5 and Biomass up to 30.

name: Jimk Innovations
author: Jimk72
description: Includes the following mods Jimk Teleporter, Custom Puck Lights, Precision Bow Workshop, Battery Powered Storage, Workshop Pistols.

name: Jimk Kryptic Camo Kit
author: Jimk72
description: New set of Workshop Armor using custom meshes which is a combination of my 2 favorite armours, Backpack, and Precision Compound Bow. All three have Kryptic camo design. Available in the Workshop under JimK Innovations tab. Also Includes a Kryptic camo Recurve Bow craftable in the Forge/Foundry.

name: Jimk Kryptic Workshop Tent
author: Jimk72
description: Adds a Kryptic camo tent to the JimK Innovations tab in the workshop.

name: Jimk Larger Batteries
author: Jimk72
description: Adds two new Battery racks. A double and a Quad Rack. A little cheaper to craft as they have less metal combined. These are also stackable.

name: Jimk Legendary HK 417
author: Jimk72
description: Legendary HK 417 that allows Custom versions to focus on Damage, Stealth, Distance, Quickness, or any combination in between. Upgradable Sights, Barrels, Attachments, and Magazines.

name: Jimk Leveling Mod
author: Jimk72
description: Increases Display Level to 500, Max talents at level 200. Follows games default curve.

name: Jimk Mammoth Upgrade
author: Jimk72
description: Upgrades Mammoth Talents to be faster, more storage, better to defend and have more usage! Makes fully leveling up a Mammoth worth it! Does not effect the base stats!

name: Jimk Mass Storage
author: Jimk72
description: Workshop Item found under JimK Innovations tab. When consumed gives a 100 slot storage container and a remote for accessing it when ever you are on the Planet. Can also be accessed locally. Costs 1000 Ren and 650 Exotics to research and then 50 Ren and 50 Exotics to craft.

name: Jimk Moa Upgrade
author: Jimk72
description: Upgrades Moa and Actic Moa Talents to be faster, more storage, better to defend and have more usage! Makes fully leveling up a Moa worth it! Does not effect the base stats!

name: Jimk Multi Teleport
author: Jimk72
description: Handheld device available from workshop tab Jimk Innovations. Allows the saving of 18 locations each for Olympus, Styx, Prometheous and Elysium. Right mouse button allows you to name and save locations and left mouse button recalls those locations.

name: Jimk No Cave Sickness
author: Jimk72
description: Removes the chance of cave sickness and adds an underground safety Buff.

name: Jimk Precise Building Deployable
author: Jimk72
description: Rightclick when deploying building pieces to pop up a menu that allow precise placement of pieces in relation to other pieces. Makes it easy to do round building and custom floor.

name: Jimk Prometheus Map Full
author: Jimk72
description: Adds the missing Map image files for the Null zone in Prometheus.

name: Jimk Reduced Weight
author: Jimk72
description: All Items over 5000 become 5000, all Items between 1000 and 5000 become 1000.

name: Jimk Shotgun With Light
author: Jimk72
description: Adds A new Trench Shotgun with a Light attachment, increases ammo to 10 and has a slightly increased rate of fire.

name: Jimk Small Electrical wires
author: Jimk72
description: Shrinks down the electrical wire and nodes. Ver 1.1 Added Water Lines and Nodes. Ver 1.2 Added Crude Oil Lines and Nodes.

name: Jimk Steel Buildables
author: Jimk72
description: Has reduced crafting costs for all items. Adds new steel building pieces crafted in the tier4 Forge. Contains Walls, Door, Double Door, Angled Wall, HalfPitches, Corner Pieces, Floors, Half Floors, Ramps, Frames, Stairs, Beams, Railings, Ladders, and a Bed. Strongest Building material in game.

name: Jimk Upright Double Freezer
author: Jimk72
description: A Double Wide Upright Freezer. Consumes 3000 power and has 60 slots. Ver 1.1 Added a defrost cycle to prevent Ice Buildup.

name: Jimk Workshop Pets
author: Jimk72
description: Adds a Bear Cub, Raccoon, and Rabbit pets plus Moa and Actic Moa mounts and saddle, available in the workshop under the Jimk Pets tab. Pets have similar talents as the cat. Max level is 25. V1.3 Fixed issue with new workshop Creatures not spawning. V1.2 Updated rabbits AI. Rabbits are still in beta!

name: Jimk Workshop Pets 2
author: Jimk72
description: Adds a pet Fawn, Miniature Wolf, Miniature Arctic Wolf, and Chick available in the workshop under the Jimk Pets tab. Pets have similar talents as the cat. Max level is 25.

name: laanp-BetterRailings
author: laanp
description: This mod adds railing options for diagonal floor pieces.

name: laanp-BuildersDream
author: laanp
description: Combines a number of mods in one package, to make building your top priority.  Includes: craft anything at no cost, increased crafting speeds, stack size increase, and CustomOptions(Jimk72), Teleporter(Jimk72) and Camera_Distance(JimK72) and much more!

name: laanp-BuildTools
author: laanp
description: Mod that provides a tool to transform, rotate, resize Buildables or Deployables in the game.

name: laanp-CaveMaster
author: laanp
description: Mod that provides cave location information and support routines, including map markers for caves and dealing with cave entrances and creatures.

name: laanp-CircleBuilder
author: laanp
description: Circle building mod that facilitates construction of up to 48 sided circular buildings.

name: laanp-Combined_QOL
author: laanp
description: Combines Quality-Of-Life mods(laanp) with others... CustomOptions(Jimk72), Teleporter(Jimk72) and Clear_Photo_Lens(JimK72)

name: laanp-CropAdvance
author: laanp
description: Mod that allows instantaneous point and click stage advance of any crop plot under your cursor.

name: laanp-CurvedStairs
author: laanp
description: This mod will add special buildable concrete curved stairs and associated railings.

name: laanp-DrillManager
author: laanp
description: A unique handheld device that allows the player to remotely communicate and control deployed Resource Drills, teleport to their location, as well as teleport to any deployed portable beacon on the map.

name: laanp-ExtraDeployables
author: laanp
description: Adds a new bench which allows crafting and placement of additional in-game deployable assets to enhance base building.

name: laanp-FreeBuild
author: laanp
description: Everything is free to build at all benches.

name: laanp-GraveStones
author: laanp
description: Introduces (10) craftable gravestones to honour those fallen prospectors.

name: laanp-GreaterHunts
author: laanp
description: Allows all Great Hunts Campaigns to be completed, without having to select only certain Campaign paths.

name: laanp-HalfCurvedStairs
author: laanp
description: A mod that introduces a new curved half-width stair buildable to accommodate curved wall configurations.

name: laanp-ItemFinder
author: laanp
description: Mod that provides ability to search all storage/bench locations for specified items and add custom names to these locations.

name: laanp-KeepTheTrees
author: laanp
description: Stops trees from falling down in a wind storm and from catching on fire due to lightning strikes

name: laanp-Lantern
author: laanp
description: Changes the in-game Battery Lantern to 'Pete's Nuclear-Powered Lantern.

name: laanp-LegacyFurnace
author: laanp
description: Brings back the ability to craft the original small legacy electric furnace, and the concrete furnace.

name: laanp-LightSwitch
author: laanp
description: Standalone Light Switch which has it's own internal power source.

name: laanp-MapTeleport
author: laanp
description: Introduces a new map exploration system and handheld tool called Pete's Map Tool that allows teleportation to anywhere on the map through a point & click system. This is an evolving mod, so changes will be introduced over time.

name: laanp-MiniFoundry
author: laanp
description: Creates a new Workshop item under 'Pete's Kits' called 'Pete's Mini Foundry'.A smaller version of the original that will fit in a single story building!

name: laanp-MoveDeployables
author: laanp
description: A mod that allows moving a deployable item in real-time.

name: laanp-MXC_Furnace
author: laanp
description: This mod will enhance the existing Workshop MXC Furnace to smelt like an Electric Furnace, increase smelting speed, and can be installed anywhere (inside/outside).

name: laanp-NoCaveCreatures
author: laanp
description: Removes Cave Worms & Bees from spawning on all prospects including Missions & Open Worlds

name: laanp-NoCaveCreaturesOW
author: laanp
description: Removes Cave Worms & Bees from spawning in caves on Open World propsects only (Olympus, Styx, Prometheus, and Elysium Maps).

name: laanp-NoFreezerIce
author: laanp
description: Stops ice from accumulating in the Deep Freeze (freezer)

name: laanp-NoKeas
author: laanp
description: Disables spawning of Keas (big parrot-like birds)

name: laanp-NoPurpleSky
author: laanp
description: This mod will switch the Prometheus map to replace Grasslands biomes to normal forest atmosphere colors.

name: laanp-NoSeedFatigue
author: laanp
description: Stops all seeded plants from experiencing 'Seed Fatigue' debuff after harvesting, and allows all crops to grow in any biome, including caves!.

name: laanp-NoSwampFog
author: laanp
description: This mod will remove fog atmosphere in both the Promethius and Elysium maps.

name: laanp-NoTreeLightningFires
author: laanp
description: Stops trees from catching on fire due to lightning strikes

name: laanp-NoWaterWheelJunk
author: laanp
description: Water wheels no longer accumulate junk.

name: laanp-NoWindFallenTrees
author: laanp
description: Stops trees from falling down in a wind storm

name: laanp-PetesAuxSlots
author: laanp
description: Provides additional auxiliary slots for any envirosuit on planet (even if the suit specs don't have any!)

name: laanp-PetesBeaconTeleport
author: laanp
description: Provides an interface to allow the player to teleport to any portable beacon that has been deployed on the map.

name: laanp-PetesBeeKit
author: laanp
description: Complete kit to allow setup of a bee-keeping station.

name: laanp-PetesCureAll
author: laanp
description: A new mysterious Exotic-infused potion that cures all ailments.

name: laanp-PetesInsaneLeveler
author: laanp
description: This mod allows players to level up very quickly, through use of a custom module.

name: laanp-PetesLavaCaveLord
author: laanp
description: This suit module enables complete damage resistance from falling in Lava, being on fire, or pneumonia and poison effects.

name: laanp-PetesMiningKit
author: laanp
description: Complete kit to assist the prospector with mining exotics, ores, super-cooled ice, oil, & water (with Water Borer on geyser) and volatile red exotics.

name: laanp-PetesMover
author: laanp
description: Custom suit module that increases base movement & sprint speed.

name: laanp-PetesResourceKiller
author: laanp
description: New suit module which enables 1-hit resource gathering for trees, rocks & ores.

name: laanp-PetesSeedKit
author: laanp
description: This mod alters the game Seed Pouch so it will have 30 slots.  It also adds a custom seed pouch in the Workshop, pre-filled with (5) each of all the seeds found in the game.

name: laanp-PetesToilet
author: laanp
description: Introduces a new item called 'Pete's Toilet', craftable at the Fabricator Bench

name: laanp-PetesTrees
author: laanp
description: New craftable, deployable trees for your base!

name: laanp-PetMover
author: laanp
description: Mod that allows you to teleport your pets.

name: laanp-PlayerTransport
author: laanp
description: Provides a quick instantaneous teleport to a pointed-to floor location, within visible range.

name: laanp-PowerSurge
author: laanp
description: All power generating devices modified to provide 50k power output, and Water Pump delivers 50k flow.

name: laanp-PumpBasin
author: laanp
description: This mod provides a craftable water pump basin, to set your water pump in.

name: laanp-RealLevels
author: laanp
description: Shows real player XP level

name: laanp-RefinedWoodEndCaps
author: laanp
description: Provides end caps for Interior Wood Beams (Closed and Boxed variations).

name: laanp-RespawnResourcesOW
author: laanp
description: Resets all Open World resources in Olympus, Styx, Prometheus and Elysium maps.  Use this mod to reset your mines, ore nodes, trees & rocks.

name: laanp-StacksAndKits
author: laanp
description: This mod is designed for Icarus players who want to keep the experience intact but like some of the other quality of life aspects of my other mods, specifically the some starter kits in Pete's Kits Workshop items.

name: laanp-StoneWoodInterior
author: laanp
description: Changes stone building pieces to have interior wood on the inside, stone on the outside.

name: laanp-TeleFly
author: laanp
description: Provides ability for your player to fly around the map and teleport to pointed-to locations, within visible range.

name: laanp-WaypointTeleport
author: laanp
description: Mod that allows player teleportation to your map waypoint marker.

name: laanp-WorkshopFree
author: laanp
description: All items in the Workshop are free to research & craft. Go crazy!

name: Larkwell Care Package
author: Eric
description: Adds multiple care packges to the game for use in the field. No Refunds.

name: Level Deployables
author: Z_Diezel
description: Levels some benches and other placeable objects so they don't look all stupid and cattywampus.

name: Lightweight Hauling
author: AgentKush
description: All ores, ingots and raw resources weigh 50% less - haul far more per trip. Covers 54 resource-tagged items. Data mod, pairs with Stack Size Overhaul.

name: Lowe Expositions
author: Hazer
description: This mod for ICARUS significantly tones down the planet's harshest environmental elements. It provides a more forgiving and focused survival experience by scaling back exposure effects and neutralizing cave-related hazards, allowing you to explore the surface and sub-surface without constant debuffs.

name: Lower Energy
author: Hazer
description: Lower Energy Cost

name: Lysdexic's Crafting Time - Half
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: Halves all crafting recipes. Adds some bulk recipes.

name: Lysdexic's Crafting Time - Quarter
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: Quarters all crafting recipes. Adds some bulk recipes.

name: Lysdexic's Fast Foliage Harvest
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: By default there is a 0.5 second delay between collecting foliage by hand. This mod lessens that delay to 0.1 seconds.

name: Lysdexic's Faster Skinning
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: Adds a skinning modifier to all knives to increase skinning speed by 500%.

name: Lysdexic's Faster Smelting
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: In the building talent tree, there is the talent 'Stoking the Flames'. This talent adds an alteration to all furnaces crafted. This mod changes those alteration values from 10 -> 50 and 15 -> 100. This ensures furnaces do not need to be replaced for this mod to take effect.

name: Lysdexic's Free Beacons
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: Makes beacons free. In my opinion, we should just have a map marker system and forego beacons entirely. Until that is implemented, this is my solution.

name: Lysdexic's Level 250 Cap
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: This mod increases the level cap to 250. Current number of talents required to max talent trees is 599. This mod adjust the talent curve beyond level 50 to give 586 talent points to account for the 13 gained from missions.

name: Lysdexic's Reduce Killcam Time
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: This mod is an attempt to lessen the time spent watching the killcam. Sometimes when a creature falls weirdly, the kill cam can last up to 4.5 seconds before releasing control back to the player. This mod tries to reduce that to 1 second.

name: Lysdexic's Small Pouches - 12
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: This mod increases the number of slots in small pouches from 6 -> 12.

name: Lysdexic's Storage Increase
author: TheLysdexicOne
description: In the building talent tree, there is the talent 'Extra Space'. This talent adds extra storage based on the number of talent points dedicated to it. This mod changes those alteration values from 3->5, 5->10, 8->15, 10->20. This ensures furnaces do not need to be replaced for this mod to take effect.

name: MADD No Snow Or Sand Buildup
author: Maddstone
description: Removes the build up of snow or sand from storm events

name: Metal Cage
author: Jimk72
description: Allows the crafting of cage building materials for animals. Ver 1.3 Updated for week 117 changes. Ver 1.4 added to fabricator.

name: Mini Fridge
author: Jimk72
description: Made by JimK72 & CK_Dexterhaven, an additional option for refrigeration - the stackable mini-fridge.

name: Mini Generator
author: Jimk72
description: Replaces Biofuel generator models with a much smaller version so you can place it on top of items and allows them to be stacked.

name: Mini Map
author: R3ap3r
description: Adds a mini map to the right side of the screen.

name: Mining Laser Overclock
author: AgentKush
description: The first-ever mining-laser blueprint mod. The mining laser runs 300s before overheating (was 5s) and cools in 1s - sustained, uninterrupted deep mining. PAK mod - all players and server must install for multiplayer.

name: Modular Affliction Adjuster
author: AgentKush
description: Comprehensive affliction adjustment - reduces stat penalties by ~50%, extends escalation times by ~50%, and reduces damage over time by ~50%. Covers all 80+ player afflictions.

name: Modular Buff Enhancer
author: AgentKush
description: Comprehensive buff enhancement - 83 core buffs plus 156 food buffs, all boosted by ~50%. Stronger tonics, better food effects, enhanced bed healing, and more.

name: More Backpack Slots
author: Hazer
description: More Start Backpack Slots - 42

name: More Daylight
author: Jimk72
description: Its supposed to add more daylight hours to the game. Seems to work sometimes.

name: More DropShip Slots
author: Bostonstrong567
description: increases the number of available drop ship slots to 25, allowing you to bring more resources, tools, and equipment to the mission.

name: More Eye Colours
author: AgentKush
description: Massive eye color expansion - 60 new colors across greens, ambers, purples, blues, greys, reds, and exotics (69 total). Plus unlocked hidden content.

name: MXC Cot
author: Zailfyer
description: modifyes the location and weight of the newly added MXC cot

name: New Props
author: Hazer
description: Create and place new props

name: Night Vision Goggles
author: AgentKush
description: Unlocks the hidden Night Vision system built into Icarus. Craft Night Vision Goggles at Fabricator, Manufacturer, or Machining Bench. Toggle with secondary action. v2.0: Added no-decay, durability (10,000 HP), reduced weight, added Machining Bench crafting.

name: Nilt's Food Bag
author: Nilt
description: Adds a bag, crafted on a textile bench, which will preserve whatever is placed inside it.  Should accept all foods and plants.

name: No Food Spoilage
author: AgentKush
description: Prevents all food spoilage. 33 decayable entries + 134 composter recipes. Items decay/despawn normally but never convert to spoiled versions. v2.0: Added 134 composter recipes for raw meats, fish, dairy, vegetables, fruits, and bait.

name: No Poison Fish
author: Jimk72
description: Removes poisonous fish from all bodies of water.

name: No Weather
author: Jimk72
description: Removes all weather from game. Updated for new DLC and new Storm Systems.

name: No Weather
author: Hazer
description: Removes all Storms, Heatwaves etc. from all Maps and Bioms

name: Non Stackable Stacks
author: Hazer
description: Make some Items Stackable (remove the Oil Barrels)

name: Noxious Crust Icon Fix
author: Apex
description: A fix for the all the types of Noxious Crust looking the same.

name: Out Of Bounds Fix
author: Jimk72
description: Replaces Out of Bounds UI with small Notification and Auto Pauses around 5 seconds.

name: Passive Ore Extractor Drills
author: AgentKush
description: 23 passive ore extractors with drill visuals. Place anywhere, connect power, load Stone. Craftable at Fabricator and Manufacturer. One per ore type including DLC ores.

name: Performance Optimizer
author: AgentKush
description: Comprehensive FPS optimization - PAK config overrides (foliage/shadow/fog/LOD reduction) plus data table changes (reduced spawns, slower hordes, extended decay, boosted fuel, weather tuning). 50 new weather events + 3 weather pools added. PAK + EXMODZ required.

name: Place WaterWheel
author: Hazer
description: Place the waterwheel in still water if there is no flowing water nearby

name: Pr0fInventoryExtensions
author: Pr0f23ss0R
description: 30 DropShip slots + prefilled canteen and o2 tank from the workshop

name: Pr0fPack
author: Pr0f23ss0R
description: Pr0fPack, Is A Overhaul Mod, Which Changes Alot Of Things

name: Pr0fWorkshopKits
author: Pr0f23ss0R
description: Adds Three Kits. Aluminium Base Kit (replaces stamina gel), Concrete Base Kit (replaces oxygen gel), Greenhouse Kit (replaces soda)

name: Precision Bow
author: Jimk72
description: Craftable bow on the fabricator bench with a custom precision bow with scope. Scope has built in range finder and auto adjusts based off ammo used. Must have unlocked the Compound Bow talent to be able to craft!

name: Precision Bow Variants
author: Jimk72
description: A Desert and Forest Camo remake of my Precision Bow Designed by Dist7action. He did an amazing job on the new textures for these Bows! Both are crafted on the Fabricator.

name: Precision Bow Workshop
author: Jimk72
description: Workshop custom precision bow with scope. Located in the Workshop under the JimK Innovations tab. Scope has built in range finder and auto adjusts based off ammo used.

name: Prefilled Items
author: Jimk72
description: When liquid and oxygen containers are crafted they will come pre filled.

name: Prophet's AI Adjustment
author: Prophet
description: Remake of the AI Adjustment made by SalJam, major props to the pioneer of the concept Saljam and props to relentlessmoose for the idea to revive it.

name: Prophet's Beyond Null EXPerience EASI
author: Prophet
description: Prophet's Beyond Null, Etheric Xenograft Potentia Expanding Automated System Integration. Version 2.8 Contains complete armor boost integration. Gives roughly a 40% increase to most stats, allows display above level 60, with beefier fortifications. Makes Tempered Glass Strong, and aluminum on par with stone brick. Every Alteration has the boost. Droppod should have triple the capacity. Resource generators also have the boost. Wooden structures recieve their talent boost. Always includes the latest in Prophets Auxiliary Mods. Includes a Recipe rebalance at the first tier, and brings sickles giving seeds back. 3.35 includes a boost to all food and some surprises when the greathunt DLC drops.

name: Prophet's Fortifications
author: Prophet
description: The Talents Work with the fortifications, 1.5 cleaned up the Interface a little.

name: Prophet's Freezer Autodefrost
author: Prophet
description: Should remove Ice from spawning in any Device similar to the freezer, Please be advised that the freezer will not allow Ice in it anymore.

name: Prophet's Real Tempered Glass
author: Prophet
description: This is simply a quality of life/realism change to the Tempered Glass making it much tougher stuff

name: Prophet's Robust Explorer Fix
author: Prophet
description: Prophet's Fix for Robust Explorer/Healthy Maverick Traits not showing what they give

name: Prophet's Tacklebox Flip
author: Prophet
description: Flips the Inventory Slots for the tacklebox so the top 3 allow fish and the bottom 2 allow lures, I haven't removed the background shadow from the tacklebox's inventory slots

name: QOL Living
author: Strelitsia_
description: Makes your playtrough very relaxed by making some quality of life changes, such as increasing some stack and slot sizes.

name: QolPack
author: Pr0f23ss0R
description: Adds A Few QOL Changes To Inventory, Equiment And Crafting

name: Queue increased
author: Hazer
description: More queue spots on many benches and on the character itself

name: Range Extented
author: Hazer
description: Extended range for fire pits, fireplaces, heaters, coolers, and more

name: Rayvens_Ammo
author: Rayven
description: Improved the damage output of obsidian arrow and cold steel ammo/arrows. [This version further increases the arrow damage to reflect that of the rifle rounds.]

name: Rayvens_Animal_Loot
author: Rayven
description: Added Super Cool Ice to boss loot table as well as red exotics.

name: Rayvens_Better_Submachine_Gun
author: Rayven
description: Removed the negative stats and reduced the reload speed.

name: Rayvens_Better_Tames
author: Rayven
description: Added better stats for tames. [This version decreases the amount of food chickens eat.]

name: Rayvens_Bigger_Pouches
author: Rayven
description: Increased slot size of pouches from 6 to 20.

name: Rayvens_Difficulty
author: Rayven
description: Increased just the difficulty for hard.

name: Rayvens_Durable_Tools
author: Rayven
description: Increased durability of maul.

name: Rayvens_Legendaries
author: Rayven
description: Added animal highlight distance to most legendaries. Decreased reload speed on some legendaries, increased ammo capacity on some of them as well. [This version updates the rate of fire of the sniper rifle.]

name: Rayvens_Modules
author: Rayven
description: Buffed up some of the workshop modules.

name: Rayvens_More_Stuff
author: Rayven
description: Can never have enough stuff crafted.

name: Rayvens_Mounts
author: Rayven
description: Added Ubis and Shaggy Zebra to the list.

name: Rayvens_Saddles
author: Rayven
description: This version adds heavy cargo slots to armored saddles. Bearhide and Racing have same stats; Basic saddles all share the DLC stats.

name: Rayvens_Small_Fish_Lure
author: Rayven
description: Made a stand alone lure catch only small fish for the aquariums.

name: Rayvens_Smelting_Speed
author: Rayven
description: This mod increases the smelting speed of the furnace that has the stoking the flames alteration.

name: Rayvens_stacks_2.5k
author: Rayven
description: Added Zailfyers charcoal and ash to the list. Must be last to load on the list for this to work properly.

name: Rayvens_Workshop
author: Rayven
description: Resource from workshop drop at 250. All ammo containers drop at 500. [This version increases the damage of all workshop arrows to reflect the damage composite arrows do. Also added 5.56 rifle rounds to the list.]

name: Reasonable Water
author: Cryorus
description: Makes water a tiny bit more reasonable and accessible by adding land based drills and more tiers

name: Reasonable Water - Flick Those Devices Add-On
author: Cryorus
description: Adds the ability to turn the water drills on or off with a button press just like wall torches

name: Rebalanced Zhang Hu Bow
author: Z_Diezel
description: Makes the Shengong Zhang Hu worth purchasing.

name: Reduced Costs
author: Hazer
description: Lower energy consumption for workbenches, air conditioning, heating, lights, etc. (now with Wooden an Bone Tools)

files.exmodz: https://github.com/Hazer-Bazer/Icarus-Mods/raw/refs/heads/main/Reduced Material Cost/Hazers Reduced Material Costs and Speed Up.EXMODZ

name: Remove G Slot Restrictions
author: Jimk72
description: This mod allows you to place normaly G slot only items(Extractors, radars, ect) in any slot including character inventory. Really helps out the solo players!

name: Resource Repacker
author: AgentKush
description: Repack raw resources back into UDA kits. 21 neutral-ratio recipes (incl. 3 DLC kits, properly feature-gated) at every crafting bench and handcrafting. NOTE: orbital sender currently rejects crafted kits - useful for inventory consolidation and teammate sharing.

name: RevFirstCohortImproved
author: RevenantKitsune
description: Increased mod slots to 4 and adds a 15% xp bonus to the First Cohort Suit

name: Revs_Total_Mount_Overhaul
author: RevenantKitsune
description: A mod that buffs the talent trees of most mounts,just not mammoth yet, and many of the tameable creatures.

name: Revs_UbisMount_Improved
author: RevenantKitsune
description: Overhaul to the Ubis Mount talent tree. Works great alongside Jim's Moa Upgrade.

name: Rhayven-LargerStationCargoandDropshipSlots_v1_w167
author: Trystan
description: It adds from 15 to 30 Slots to the OEI and Player Drop Ship

name: Rhayvenwolf-SoyandCoconutMilk_v1_w195
author: RhayvenWolf
description: It adds the ability to make milk in the stove using Soy beans, Mature coconuts and an Empty milk bottle or milk can

name: rm_3rd_Socket
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_DeployableSetup.  Attempts to restore the third Exotics Extractor socket.  Heater/AC can be placed on the wall.

name: rm_Aggression
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_AISetup, D_GOAPSetup.  Included in rm_Angry_Moose.  More creatures hate everything.  Take the Bear Cub's aggressive behavior - most carnivores will now mimic this.

name: rm_Angry_Moose
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_AISetup, D_AISpawnRules, D_AISpawnZones, D_AutonomousSpawns, D_EpicCreatures.  Please do not use if you do not own Styx, and New Horizons DLC! Mixes some creatures from all maps into all maps, in limited or balanced weights. Cubs, Crocodiles, Jaguars, Cougars, Tuskers, Dracs, Shaggy Zebra, and Strikers are some mixed in. Added more Exotic Infused creatures to Prometheus. Now with +25% more creatures. Spawn balances, and MORE balances. Improved creature aggressiveness and infighting.

name: rm_Buffs_and_Bundles
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Consumable.  Minor tweaks to a few buffs.  Bundles size improvements.

name: rm_Bulk_Recipes
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_ProcessorRecipes. Tier 5 recipes. New 12.7mm ammo recipe! Adds bulk recipes for many processor recipes and more.

name: rm_Caveworm_Exotics
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_ItemRewards.  Adds 10% for Caveworms to drop a low amount of Exotics.

name: rm_Desired_Drop
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_DropGroups.  Numerous additional Drop Zones.

name: rm_Equal_Bloodlines
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_GeneticLineages.  All bloodlines are equally weighted.

name: rm_Equal_Phenotypes
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Mounts.  Only uncommon, rare, and/or legendary skins possible.  No basic skins.  Equal odds for each.

name: rm_GH_Choices
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_GreatHunts.  Permits completion of all Great Hunts missions per map.

name: rm_Graphics_Tier_Fix
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_GraphicsTierDescription, D_GraphicsTierDescriptionMods.  Fixed an oversight potentially preventing Nvidia cards from full mod benefit.  VRAM rows added, defining all ranges for AMD & Nvidia GPUs.  9000 series AMD and 5000 series NVidia GPUs added.  Corrected RX7600XT line, allowing D_GraphicsTierDescriptionMods to do more work.

name: rm_Half_EXP
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Modifiers, D_CharacterStartingStats.  Prospectors shall receive half (50%) experience points from all sources.

name: rm_IceBreaker
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_AIGrowth.  IceBreaker, aka Jotunfror, aka Hrimthurs, aka Giant Reindeer, is now Vulnerable. Good luck in slaying the deadly beast.

name: rm_Inventory
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_InventoryInfo.  Workshop inventory increased from 200 to 300. All dropships increased from 15 to 20. Overflow bags increased from 150 to 200. Player graves increased from 70 to 100. Most fuel slots increased from 1 to 2. Many processor and container inventory expansions.

name: rm_Items_Plus
author: relentlessmoose
description: RENAME of rm_Filled_Attachments. Edits: D_ItemStatic, D_Durable, D_Fillable.   Increased durability of workshop items, wind turbines, wall defenses. Adds attachments to workshop armor, and some tools/weapons. Adds station repair option to some items. Allows workshop power source to recharge via Charging Station. Pre-filled Workshop Canteens and Oxygen Tanks. Minor oxygen and canteen capacity increases.Some battery powered tool capacity increases.

name: rm_Levels_Character
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_CharacterGrowth.  Displays actual level of player. ZERO additional Character talent points.

name: rm_Levels_Tames
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_CharacterGrowth.  Displays actual level of player and tames/mounts. Increases (doubles) maximum level of Mounts to 100, and Pets to 50. ZERO additional Character talent points.

name: rm_Meta_Attachments
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_ItemStatic.  Most Workshop tools, weapons, and armor now have Attachment slots.

name: rm_Moar_Power
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Energy.  Wind Turbine output: 2250.  Solar Panel output: 8000.  Flat Solar Panel: 10000.

name: rm_Modifiers
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_ModifierStates, D_StatAfflictions.  Increased aura radius, including talents, pet talents, and dehumidifiers.  Team Modules effect user.  Exotic Debuff tweaked.

name: rm_No_Ore_Left_Behind
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Talents, D_VoxelSetupData.  Changes the Waste Not talent to give additional ore instead of stone.  Provides a chance for Exotics when mining Platinum & Titanium.

name: rm_Null_Comms
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Biomes.  Eliminates the Null Sector's ability to hinder communications.

name: rm_Stack_Sizes
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Itemable.  Many improved stack sizes over vanilla.

name: rm_Total_Moose_Experience
author: relentlessmoose
description: Dangerous Horizons! Drone and vesper behavior tweaks. Outposts have full EXP. Does not include files from: rm_Half_EXP, rm_IceBreaker.

name: rm_Tracker
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_PlayerTrackers.  Added all new creatures and some items.  For those who want to know how many Dracs they've killed and beyond.  100+ previously untracked items, things, or actions included.  Tracks kills for nearly every creature in the game.  Tracks all buildables crafted, and all decorations crafted.  Half of these values are only visible if you open your Accolades.json file.

name: rm_World_Bosses
author: relentlessmoose
description: Edits: D_Terrains.  Olympus: 4 Black Wolf, and 4 Sandworm. Styx: 4 Giant Scorpion, 4 Black Wolf, and 4 Sandworm. Prometheus: 2 Hammerhead, 1 Lava Hunter.

name: SalJam_Bench_Separation
author: SalJam
description: Manufacturer only has Dangerous Horizons craftables

name: SalJam_Chargable_Devices_Advanced
author: SalJam
description: Adds advanced versions of all Lithium Tools, Laser tools and Battery Lights. The batteries are increased to 25K and 15K respectively. Also includes an Advanced Charging Device that increases power from 500 to 1500 for faster recharging.

name: SalJam_Dangerous_Horizons_QOL
author: SalJam
description: Added additional Advanced versions of workshop scanner and extractor all with increases in stats. 2 new purchaseable workshop suits and backpacks. Increased output versions of oil pump, refiner and charging station. Added multiple exotic recipies in both chemistry bench and Eden trader. Added raptor talent and  recipe to create Uranium rods.

name: SalJam_Full_Trophies
author: SalJam
description: Adds a set of full body trophies for several Icarus creatures, with a base and without.  Includes some animals from all maps and most biomes, but is a continous project.

name: SalJam_Repair_Bench
author: SalJam
description: Adds a repair bench that only uses electricity for repairs, but repairing will take time. Tools and weapons can be repaired, NOT including workshop as they couldnt be returned once repaired. Includes an alteration bench for removing attachments in 1 second, as these cant be repaired

name: SalJam_Roaming_NPCs
author: SalJam
description: Added random spawns of TPS soldiers over the map. Some will drop higher end loot

name: SalJam_Speeder_Nuclear
author: SalJam
description: The speeder has 12 inventory slots, 2 heavy slots and is much quicker & fuel efficient

name: SalJam_SuperTeslaCoil
author: SalJam
description: This adds a new Super Tesla Coil. Its bigger and more powerful, dealing 500 electric damage instead of 100. It has higher power requirements though.

name: SalJam_Uranium_Collector_QOL
author: SalJam
description: Increases slots to 12 and extends the active radius from 2000 to 17500 units, so you can clean up the bodies.

name: SalJam_Workshop_Deployables
author: SalJam
description: Adds endgame WorkShop Deployables. An Exotic Scanner that has a 4x larger scan area, Exotic and uranium extractors that are twice as fast and have 18 slots. A solar panel that gives 20k power, a battery with 15M capacity and 20k flow rate. A heater and cooler that give a massive radius and an ore diluter that increases ore. Larger Oil, Water and Biofuel containers also.

name: Sarge_100k_Stack_Size
author: Sarge
description: increases stack sizes of most every item to 100,000 for easier inventory management. does not alter item weights.

name: Sarge_Basic_Saddle_Improvements
author: Sarge
description: improves the basic riding saddle to have more cargo space and multiple buffs to the animal it's equipped onto.

name: Sarge_Better_Backpacks
author: Sarge
description: adds a ''Hercules'' backpack that can be crafted which has enormous carry weight and weight reducer buffs on it.

name: Sarge_Better_Basic_Animal_Feed
author: Sarge
description: adds a small food consumption reduction buff and removes the spoilage timer on the basic seed & wheat animal feed.

name: Sarge_Better_Difficulty_Levels
author: Sarge
description: increases animal's perception range on all 3 difficulties as well as removing the 3 death limit on hard difficulty.

name: Sarge_Better_Tamed_Animals
author: Sarge
description: increases the xp buff for recently petted animals and raises their max level to 200

name: Sarge_Better_Wood_Buildings
author: Sarge
description: adds some buffs to various wood structures as well as swapping materials on reinforced wood to using nails (from beeswax) and on interior wood to beeswax (from nails)

name: Sarge_Custom_Crafting
author: Sarge
description: adds a new Sarge crafting bench (anvil mesh) that the character can hand craft and a bunch of new items that can be made on the new bench. multiple new suit modules that can be crafted as well as an improved lantern and various other items.

name: Sarge_Deployable_Slots_Changes
author: Sarge
description: increases the slot counts in many storages and reduces slots in many craft stations making storages more useful instead of using craft stations as storages.

name: Sarge_Envirosuit
author: Sarge
description: modifies the basic suit to have 8 module slots as well as more storage, weight, and some buffs as well.

name: Sarge_Fish_Trap_Changes
author: Sarge
description: makes fish traps a little more logical and easier to craft as well as better chances on the fish they can catch.

name: Sarge_New_Foods
author: Sarge
description: adds fruit juices made from watermelons and berries with buffs to go with them as well as dried pumpkin as a cheap trailfood to carry with you while exploring.

name: Sarge_Non_Decaying_Animal_Carcasses
author: Sarge
description: animal carcasses no longer decay so you will find half eaten ones or skeletons scattered around as you wander. pairs super well with SalJam's AI Adjustments mod for increased wild animal interactions.

name: Sarge_Reinforced_Stone_Buildings
author: Sarge
description: adds reinforced versions of the stone structures with increased ingredient costs.

name: Sarge_Slower_Food_Spoilage
author: Sarge
description: increases the spoilage timers for various food items. most were roughly doubled.

name: Sarge_Stronger_Reinforced_Buildings
author: Sarge
description: beefs up the ''reinforced'' buff applied to buildings so that it has better health and weather resistances.

name: Sarge_Stronger_Spikey_Spikes
author: Sarge
description: increases the hedgehod spike damage modifier from 25% to 1000% for near instant kills. be careful!

name: Sarge_Well_Rested_XP_Buff
author: Sarge
description: adds a 200% experience buff to the existing well rested bonus from sleeping, incentivizing sleeping every night.

name: Scope For CrossBows
author: Jimk72
description: Adds scope UI when aiming to Titanium and Platinum Crossbow.

name: Scoped rifle
author: Jimk72
description: Allows you to craft a scoped hunting rifle using the Fabricator bench. Has a 10x and 20x zoom option.

name: Semac_IcarusOverhaul
author: Semac
