description: Changes a little of almost everything, Check Readme. BROKEN DO NOT USE

name: Semac_IcarusOverhaul_Thor
author: Semac
description: Same as Semac_IcarusOverhaul but the Thor Dev Hammer is added. BROKEN DO NOT USE

name: Semac_IcarusOverhaulExtreme
author: Semac
description: An Extreme version of Semac_IcarusOverhaul, Hard difficulty is turned up to 11.

name: Semac_Meta_Lantern
author: Semac
description: Replaces the Meta Bandage with a refillable Lantern (Included with the Overhaul mods).

name: Slider
author: Jimk72
description: This is similar to my Elevator mod but creates a platform that when standing on will slide out 4 or 8 floor spots in any direction. Updated with New floor model as original was modified by Devs so I decided to use a custom floor piece from my Steel Buildables mod that will be released soon.

name: Solar Panel Expansion
author: AgentKush
description: Adds all solar panels and Solar Backpack to a dedicated Solar Energy Workshop tab. Includes Solar Panel Kit, Flat Solar Panel Kit, and Solar Backpack Kit with fair pricing.

name: Something Fishy!
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: Designed to dramatically improve fishing. Craftable in the Fishing Bench: a new rod, lure, and trap with greater recipe requirements, but improved buffs.

name: Stack Size Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: Increases stack sizes on 1,258 items. Resources/ammo/ores 5x, everything else 3x. Max cap 9999. v1.3: Added Gruel stack size (300).

name: Stacks 1K
author: Hazer
description: Increase your Stacks up to 1K.

name: Stacks 250
author: Hazer
description: Increase your Stacks up to 250!

name: Stacks 500
author: Hazer
description: Increase your Stacks up to 500!

name: Stacks 750
author: Hazer
description: Increase your Stacks up to 750!

name: Strel's God Mode
author: Strelitsia_
description: Litrually God Mode. I think it's pretty self explanatory

name: Strel's Instant Fish
author: Strelitsia_
description: Makes catching fish a breeze! It modifies the Refined Wood Fishing Rod for fish to instantly bite.

name: Super Stick
author: Apex
description: A very powerful, craftable stick. Perfect to use while AFK. Now with a craftable module variant.

name: Survival Attachments
author: AgentKush
description: Adds food, oxygen, and water armor attachments. Doubles attachment slots on every armor piece (Head/Arms/Body/Legs/Feet from 1 to 2). Three new Alteration Bench recipes: Oxygen Recycler (-25% oxygen), Nutrient Dispenser (-25% food), Hydration Cell (-25% water).

name: Tactical Deluxe Backpack
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: This very powerful, practical backpack has all the attributes of the Larkwell-Martinez Tactical above, but also prevents your food from spoiling on long journeys. In addition, this enhanced version includes the attributes of all top-tier workshop backpacks. Expensive to craft on the Fabricator, but worth it! Recommended to craft two so you can keep one charging up at a Charging Station.

name: Tactical Elysium Backpack
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: This very powerful, practical backpack has all the attributes of the Larkwell-Martinez Tactical above, but also prevents your food from spoiling on long journeys. In addition, this enhanced version includes the attributes of all top-tier workshop backpacks. Expensive to craft on the Fabricator, but worth it! This version replaces the requirement for black wolf tooth with inert uranium, and also offers some radiation resistance. Recommended to craft two so you can keep one charging up at a Charging Station.

name: Tactical Icebox Backpack
author: CK_Dexterhaven
description: This very powerful, practical backpack has all the attributes of the Larkwell-Martinez Tactical above, but also prevents your food from spoiling on long journeys. Expensive to craft on the Fabricator, but worth it! Recommended to craft two so you can keep one charging up at a Charging Station.

name: Taming & Tames Overhaul
author: AgentKush
description: Faster taming (3x), faster breeding (2x gestation + double juvenile chance), easier taming upkeep, and 3x tame-growth XP across all 29 tameable creatures. No combat-stat changes.

name: Teleporter
author: Jimk72
description: New Teleporter that allows as many base stations as you want. When you walk into it you can select what other base station you want to travel to. Also has a handheld that will allow you to travel to a base station from anywhere.

name: Thor Hammer
author: Jimk72
description: Allows Thors Hammer to be crafted on player for free. This hammer has been reduced in size so it is not visible on screen. This was done for creating videos so there is no hammer visible. Thors Hammer when equiped will allow you to Fly around(Left mouse button) and float in air(Right mouse button).

name: Tier 3 Electricity
author: Jimk72
description: Moves the Biofuel generator and the spline tool to the Machining bench where it should be.

name: Tier Upgrade Forge
author: AgentKush
description: Upgrade tools and weapons to the next tier without rebuilding from scratch. 26 upgrade recipes across pickaxes, axes, knives, spears, swords, and bows.

name: Trap and Defense Expansion
author: AgentKush
description: 23 defense recipes using real game items. Unlocks 4 elemental landmines (Poison/Burn/Shock/Freeze) previously enemy-only. Cheap early-game fortifications, traps without rare drops, and batch packs.

name: True Level
author: Hazer
description: Displays the correct level without enforcing the level 60 restriction.

name: Turret Variants
author: AgentKush
description: 15 new automated turret variants with unique firing patterns. v3.6: restored turret models + ammo loading fix so all standard, DLC and workshop ammo loads after the w237/238 update. Includes Crossbow, Bow, Sniper, Assault Rifle, SMG, Javelin, Flamethrower, Rock, Minigun, Rifle, Pistol, Shotblaster, Rapid Crossbow, Storm, and Heavy Sniper turrets.

name: UDA Terminal Laptop
author: AgentKush
description: Reskins the vanilla Orbital Exchange Interface into a laptop, makes it craftable for free (no tech unlock) with the original recipe (Steel Ingot 5, Electronics 5, Glass 3, Epoxy 2), and lets you place it indoors and on benches/tables. PAK + data bundled in the EXMODZ.

name: Usagi_Creature_Chaos_HI
author: KiichigoUsagi/CKDexterHaven
description: Recreation of DexterHaven's Creature Chaos

name: Venomtron
author: Venomtron
description: QOL mod, that changes many items to make the game less grindy See read me file for a list of changes

name: War Beasts
author: AgentKush
description: The first taming-combat mod. Husbandry combat talents 3x stronger - tamed creatures hit harder, survive longer (3x health) and move faster (2x). Build true war beasts.

name: Waste Not
author: CritFail (Updated by AgentKush)
description: Mining yields useful secondary resources instead of Stone. Normal ores give bonus of the same type, dense metal ores drop Exotics. Coal gives Charcoal, Ice gives Oxite. Covers all 33 mineable deposit types.

name: Weapons Pack 1
author: Jimk72
description: This gives you 2 new handguns, 2 assault rifles They are all tier 4 so require the Fabricator bench to craft.

name: Weapons Pack 2
author: Jimk72
description: Ver. 2.7 Updated Scopes and animations to new ones in game. Sniper now uses new sniper ammo in game. Fixed assault rifle with scope and sniper rifle that was originaly in game.require the Fabricator bench to craft.

name: Windmill Generator
author: Jimk72
description: Allows you to craft a windmill generator. Craftable in Machining/Fabricator Benches, Generates 5000watts. Updated for week 151! Ver 1.4 removed damage cycle!

name: Workshop Armor Kryptic Camo
author: Jimk72
description: Replaces the workshop armor textures with custom ones that uses a green kryptic pattern.

name: Workshop Horse Stim Implant
author: Z_Diezel
description: This mod removes the penalty to sprint speed in the Trotting Pace talent and adds a sprint speed buff. The talent is now titled Stim Implant.

name: Workshop Recyclers
author: AgentKush
description: Two recycling machines (Biofuel T3 + Organic T4) plus an Incinerator for instant item destruction. 5,340 recipes: 1,948 deconstruct + 335 recycle + 3,054 incinerate + 3 crafting. v5.5: Added 886 missing incinerate recipes (frozen items, ores, food, building pieces). Every item in the game now covered. Fixed icon, mesh, and tech tree.

name: Z_Diezel's Advanced Orbital Exchange Interface
author: Z_Diezel
description: An Orbital Exchange Interface that is able to direct the exchange pods to an exact location. Requires the T2 Orbital Exchange Interface talent. Crafted at the Fabricator. This version does NOT require electricity. (The asset mesh exists in the game files. I built the necessary data around it, and made the uasset icon. A future Icarus update may change the blueprint, so I left it as it is for now.)

name: Z_Diezel's Cryo-canister
author: Z_Diezel
description: A portable ice-infused elanthium cryogenic canister to keep perishables from spoiling. Crafted at the Fabricator from 8 Iron Ingot, 10 Aluminum Ingot, 3 Carbon Paste, 10 Exotics, and 18 Ice. Has 10 slots.

name: Z_Diezel's Cryo-canister Workshop
author: Z_Diezel
description: A portable ice-infused elanthium cryogenic canister to keep perishables from spoiling. Purchased in the workshop tab named Diezel Inc.

name: Z_Diezel's Exotics Resource Supply
author: Z_Diezel
description: An Exotics Resource Supply Package for all your elanthium-infused crafting needs.

name: Z_Diezel's Glutton Module
author: Z_Diezel
description: Adds an extra food and stomach slot, because who doesn't need extra carbs? Debuffs all speed-related traits by 10%.

name: Z_Diezel's God Module
author: Z_Diezel
description: Welcome to deification. Feel free to modify the workshop research and replication cost.

name: Z_Diezel's Honey 'Protein' Bar
author: Z_Diezel
description: A yummy protein snack for a sustainable Icarus. It's better not to ask what's in it. Crafted in the Mortal and Pestle.

name: Z_Diezel's Salt Collector
author: Z_Diezel
description: Place in water, add Stone. Automatically accumulates Salt. Requires Biofuel Composter research in the Tech Tree.

name: Z_Diezel's Ultra Fertilizer + Spoiled Meat
author: Z_Diezel
description: Allows Spoiled Meat and a second element to produce High-Quality, Growth, Recovery, and Resistance fertilizers in the composter, and replaces Progenitive Fertilizer with new Exotic Ultra Fertilizer.

name: Z_Diezel's Wirtz Pump Water Wheel
author: Z_Diezel
description: A combined wheel and generator with an added water pump function. Requires Water Wheel research in the Tech Tree.

name: Zailfyers 100 Level Cap
author: Zailfyer
description: Increases max level to 100 with the same scale for points

name: Zailfyers Armor
author: Zailfyer
description: Chnages many armor set bonuses. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Arrow Recipes
author: Zailfyer
description: Changes arrow recipes. Refer README for more details

name: Zailfyers Backpacks
author: Zailfyer
description: Changes all the backpack stats and adds a new backpack. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Building Alterations
author: Zailfyer
description: Alters Aluminum Buildings, makes scoria building stats the same as stone. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Charcoal and Ash
author: Zailfyer
description: Makes charcoal a fuel among other changes. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Deep Ore Extraction
author: Zailfyer
description: Deep ore deposits extract faster

name: Zailfyers Deep Ore Extraction Limited
author: Zailfyer
description: Deep ore deposits have limited ore (like they uesed too) and extract faster

name: Zailfyers Dropship
author: Zailfyer
description: Drop ship has 20 slots among other things. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Energy Production
author: Zailfyer
description: Changed the bio fuel generator to produce 7500, the water wheel to produce 5000, and the wind turbine to produce 3000

name: Zailfyers Envirosuits
author: Zailfyer
description: Changes the stats granted by most of the envirosuits. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Exotics Extraction
author: Zailfyer
description: Changes a bunch of exotic extraction realated things. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Moduals
author: Zailfyer
description: Changes the stats of a number of moduals and adds 2 new ones. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers More World Bosses
author: Zailfyer
description: Increases the amount of world bosses to be spawned in exploration prospects

name: Zailfyers Rebalanced Animal Loot
author: Zailfyer
description: Rebalances what you get from animals

name: Zailfyers Rebalanced Rewards
author: Zailfyer
description: Increases exotic and enzyme reward range for horde mode among other things. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Red Only Extraction
author: Zailfyer
description: Red exotics extraction changes only. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Sledgehammer Talent
author: Zailfyer
description: Makes the talent for pickaxe stamina cost also affect the sledgehammer.

name: Zailfyers Stacks Recipes
author: Zailfyer
description: Many stack counts increased, and many recipies altered. Refer README for details

name: Zailfyers Starter Kits
author: Zailfyer
description: Add 3 kits to the orbital workshop containing a bunch of workbenches for t3, t4, and power generators.

name: Zailfyers Unleashed Exotics
author: Zailfyer
description: Changed exotic spawns for explortations. there have been reports of droping in to nothing. i have not found the cause or a work aound for it yet. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers Workshop Tools
author: Zailfyer
description: Changes nearly all the workshop tools and adds a new knife, axe, and pickaxe. Refer to README for details.

name: Zailfyers_Animal_Feeds
author: Zailfyer
description: Adds more animal feeds. Refer to README for details

name: Zailfyers_Mount_Improvments

description: Improves Terrenus and Moa mounts

name: zen-Enable T4 Butcher
author: Zenethian
description: Adds the unreleased T4 Marble Butcher Bench.  It combines the same recipes as a T3 butcher bench and the fileting side of the fishing bench, but it auto-crafts the recipes.

name: zen-Enable T4 Smoker
author: Zenethian
description: Adds the unreleased T4 Smoker.  It uses electricity instead of charcoal, but has no new recipes.

name: zen-HideTameMapIcons
author: Zenethian
description: Hides all tamed creature arrows from the map.

name: zen-ShieldedNuclearReactor
author: Zenethian
description: Adds radiation containment to the Nuclear Reactor, preventing it from leaking radiation into the nearby area.

name: Zombie Wolf Texture
author: Jimk72
description: Changes the Wolfs texture to make it look like a zombie wolf.
